purpose: State ledger for the active Approved Agent Build Runner stage. The current stage allows exactly one already-human-approved docs/register/validator/check-script agent-build task per branch in allowlisted governance paths; it still never authorizes runtime product changes, protected-scope changes, automatic repair, automatic merge, deployment, approval, or PR closing.
